[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111101 6
1 0001001 2
2 0101000 2
3 0011001 3
4 1011000 3
5 0000001 1
6 0010010 2
7 1111101 6

34 43 1111111 a

70 07 0011101 4
